_comment: Install the server first: `npm i -g @team-monet/local`. Then drop this into a test repo as .mcp.json (or merge), and reload Claude Code. Storage defaults to <repo>/.monet; set env.MONET_STORAGE_DIR to override. First launch downloads the MiniLM model once. Zero-install alt: command 'npx', args ['-y','@team-monet/local','start'].
